heroHeadline: 5,519 Killed in 10 Months as Gangs Expand Beyond Port-au-Prince; UN GSF Replaces MSS
heroSubtitle: UN OHCHR documents mass atrocities and police summary executions; Kenya-led MSS ends as Gang Suppression Force deploys; Haiti schedules first elections in a decade for August 2026
footerNote: Data sourced from UN BINUH, OHCHR, OCHA, IOM, Reuters, AP, Miami Herald, Al Jazeera, Le Nouvelliste, ACLED, ICG, HRW, WFP
